name: Extended Replacement Cost 110%
description: Pays up to 110% of dwelling limit if rebuild costs exceed the policy limit — carrier-specific form not in ISO standard

name: Extended Replacement Cost 125%
description: Pays up to 125% of dwelling limit (ISO HO 04 20 25% option; ISO filing factor 1.03)

name: Extended Replacement Cost 150%
description: Pays up to 150% of dwelling limit (ISO HO 04 20 50% option; ISO filing factor 1.06)

name: Extended Replacement Cost 200%
description: Pays up to 200% of dwelling limit — carrier-specific; approaches guaranteed replacement cost territory

name: Guaranteed Replacement Cost
description: Pays full actual reconstruction cost regardless of policy limit — rarely available in CA wildfire-exposed areas (ISO HO 04 11; ISO filing factor 1.15)

name: Building Code Upgrade — Ordinance & Law
description: Increases code-compliance rebuild coverage above the CA-mandatory 10% floor. CA ICC §10103.7 requires 10% minimum; this endorsement adds more. Typical cost ~$66/yr per $40K of additional coverage (ISO HO 04 77)

name: Inflation Guard 4%
description: Automatically increases Coverage A/B/C/D limits 4% annually on a pro-rata basis to track construction cost inflation (ISO HO 04 46)

name: Inflation Guard 6%
description: Automatically increases Coverage A/B/C/D limits 6% annually — recommended for CA given post-wildfire construction cost spikes (ISO HO 04 46)

name: Replacement Value — Personal Property
description: Upgrades personal property (Coverage C) loss settlement from actual cash value to full replacement cost. Ineligible: antiques fine arts collectibles. Replacement must be completed within 180 days (ISO HO 04 90)

name: Water Backup and Sump Overflow ($5K)
description: Covers water damage from sewer/drain backup or sump pump overflow up to $5000. Removes power-failure exclusion for this peril (ISO HO 04 95 limited form)

name: Water Backup and Sump Overflow ($25K)
description: Broader water backup coverage up to $25000 — removes origin-of-water restriction (ISO HO 06 95 broadened form)

name: Service Line Coverage ($10K)
description: Covers underground utility line repair on the insured's property — water/sewer/electric/gas/communications lines. Covers wear-and-tear and tree-root damage excluded by standard HO (ISO HO 06 69; introduced 2022 program)

name: Identity Fraud Expense ($15K)
description: Reimburses identity fraud recovery costs up to $15000 including attorney fees lost income ($200/day cap) and long-distance calls. $500 deductible (ISO HO 04 55)

name: Personal Injury Liability
description: Extends liability coverage to personal injury torts not in standard HO: false arrest libel slander wrongful eviction invasion of privacy (ISO HO 24 10)

name: Workers Compensation
description: Covers workers compensation liability for household/domestic employees (HO 90 10 86)

name: Loss Assessment Coverage ($10K)
description: Increases special assessment coverage to $10000 for HOA or condo association losses from covered perils above the standard $1000 limit (ISO HO 04 35)

name: Earthquake Loss Assessment
description: Covers the insured's share of an HOA/condo special assessment resulting from earthquake damage — critical for CA condo owners (ISO HO 04 36)

name: Equipment Breakdown
description: Covers repair or replacement of household appliances and mechanical systems (HVAC water heater electrical panels) from mechanical or electrical failure — perils excluded by standard HO (ISO HO 06 33)

name: Mold and Fungi Coverage
description: Limited coverage for fungi wet/dry rot and bacteria including remediation air testing and associated liability sublimit. Not covered by standard HO without this endorsement (ISO HO 04 26/27)

name: Home-Sharing Host Activities
description: Removes the standard HO exclusion for short-term rental hosting (Airbnb/VRBO). Covers both property and liability during hosting periods (ISO HO 06 62)

name: Home Business Insurance (Comprehensive)
description: Standalone mini-commercial policy attached to HO. Covers business personal property valuable papers accounts receivable and business liability for a business operated from the residence (ISO HO 07 01). Rate is approximate midpoint

name: Green and Sustainable Building Upgrades
description: Covers the additional cost to repair or replace damaged property with LEED-equivalent certified green/sustainable materials and construction methods (ISO HO 06 31)

name: Assisted Living Care Coverage
description: Extends personal property coverage to a relative residing in an assisted living or skilled care facility (ISO HO 04 59)
